boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Pre-change callback source is missing per STD-QUA-071-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 used post-change email thread instead of pre-change vendor-master phone source, leaving the timing scope gate open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The pre-change callback source gate remains open, despite VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071 being closed.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source IDs (ALERT-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, CALL-QUA-071, PAY-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071, VM-QUA-071, STD-QUA-071-P)
Action boundary: May AP release payment after vendor bank update?
final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed because the pre-change callback source gate remains open. CALL-QUA-071 used a post-change email thread, violating STD-QUA-071-P's requirement for a pre-change vendor-master phone source. While other dependencies are met, this critical timing scope issue leaves the source boundary open. The ALERT-QUA-071 bank-change alert also requires resolution as part of the repair.
open_blockers: Pre-change callback source required by STD-QUA-071-P timing_scope_authority_dependency_check remains open.
Policy requires explicit justification for using post-change callback source (CALL-QUA-071) instead of pre-change vendor-master phone source.
ALERT-QUA-071 bank-change alert must be addressed as part of repair.
